title: Remove and inspect internal air temperature sensor

blocks.text: Remove and inspect internal air temperature sensor
Disconnect the air hose (A). Disconnect the coupler (B). Remove the internal air temperature sensor (C).
Installation is the reverse of the removal procedure.
Confirm that the resistance between the No. 1 and No. 2 terminals of the internal air temperature sensor is within the range shown in the graph.

items.text: Measure the change in resistance by heating or cooling it with a hair dryer, etc.
Measure the change in resistance by heating or cooling it with a hair dryer, etc.
Since the inside of the sensor is a thermistor, a digital circuit tester should be used since a large measurement current will cause self-heating.
Since the inside of the sensor is a thermistor, a digital circuit tester should be used since a large measurement current will cause self-heating.
Measure in a location where the ambient temperature is stable.
Measure in a location where the ambient temperature is stable.
